subject: A one-eyed cyclops emerging from a starfield, wreathed in constellation-like motes, hefting a massive boulder overhead with both arms
description: A muscular one-eyed cyclops dominates the frame, its body partially dissolving into a swirl of starry night-sky energy at the edges. Long matted hair streams around its head as it raises a hefting a massive jagged boulder overhead, mid-throw. The figure is rendered in warm reddish-tan tones against a cool blue-white starfield punctuated by glowing constellation specks, giving the creature the iconic Nyxborn 'born of the night sky' appearance. The mood is violent and mythic — a giant about to hurl a stone with terrible force.
foreground: cyclops with raised boulder, single central eye, bare muscular torso
background: starry night-sky energy / Nyx constellation field
